Core Focus

I am a self-directed technologist with a broad foundation spanning software engineering, machine learning, and quantitative systems. My approach blends mathematical rigour with practical implementation — from neural networks to financial models.

My work is guided by a belief that the most powerful solutions live at the intersection of elegant design and deep technical knowledge. I pursue mastery across the full stack: from low-level algorithms to high-level system architecture.

Currently based in Kolkata, India — working on AI/ML systems, exploring quantitative finance, and building tools that make complex ideas approachable.

Expertise

What I Do

A refined set of disciplines cultivated through years of deliberate practice and real-world application.

Machine Learning

From regression to deep neural networks — building, training, and deploying models that learn from data with mathematical precision.

PyTorch scikit-learn XGBoost LSTMs

Software Engineering

Designing systems in Python, Java, and C that are clean, maintainable, and built for scale. Strong foundations in algorithms and data structures.

Python Java C / C++ REST APIs

LLM & AI Systems

Architecting intelligent pipelines with LangChain, LangGraph, and the Anthropic API — turning language models into functional, reliable tools.

LangChain LangGraph RAG Agents

Quantitative Finance

Modelling market dynamics with Python and ML. Building LSTM-based stock prediction systems and exploring quantitative strategies on Nifty50 data.

LSTM Pandas Nifty50 Backtesting

Data Science

Uncovering patterns and communicating insight. From exploratory analysis to statistical modelling with a strong grounding in probability theory.

NumPy Matplotlib Statistics EDA

Mathematics

The foundation beneath everything — linear algebra, multivariate calculus, probability, and statistics applied to real machine learning problems.

Linear Algebra Calculus Probability Optimization
